_comment: Claim-fidelity spec for the handoff skill, REFRESH scenario. See spec.json for the planner/lens-4 split rationale. The prompt carries a list-verb task directive (`run a refresh pass`) that bypasses the chunker plus refresh wording (`refresh`/`write`), so `plan_handoff_run.py` deterministically resolves intent=refresh, whose planner _required_reads are state-selection.md + spill-targets.md (the RCF). Every other reference is on-demand here (read under a different intent or condition). declaredReferences is the full set (coverage). referenceEngagement uses the engage-always/on-demand/gate-sufficient axis from the methodology contract (charness-artifacts/spec/2026-06-23-skill-claim-fidelity-doc-philosophy.md). thresholds omitted until a baseline capture sets a budget. SLICE 7 (2026-07-01) CAPTURE — floor PROVEN: the refresh run opened BOTH RCF docs state-selection.md + spill-targets.md (coverage 2/7, outcome=passed), so #410's 'drop the refresh docs -> RSF' is REFUTED — both are load-bearing planner reads. document-seams.md removed + deleted (DUP). thresholds.max_duration_ms set from this passing baseline (273120ms, ~2x).
prompt: /charness:handoff run a refresh pass and write the next-session state, spilling durable detail to its owning artifact and keeping only what changes the next action

adapter-contract.md.rationale: The planner reads this only when the adapter is missing, warned, or invalid; a healthy repo resolves the artifact location from the resolved adapter without opening the explainer doc.
adapter-contract.md.trigger: adapter is missing, warned, or invalid (planner _required_reads condition)

chunked-routing.md.rationale: A chunked_routing-intent planner read; not opened on a refresh run that carries a task directive.
chunked-routing.md.trigger: bare/namespaced invocation with no task directive — route the backlog before pickup

continuation-sequence.md.rationale: A pickup-intent planner read; not opened on a refresh run.
continuation-sequence.md.trigger: pickup intent — ordering the next move as continuation rather than history

spill-targets.md.rationale: A refresh-intent UNCONDITIONAL planner required read: governs what durable detail moves to its owning artifact versus what stays, so a refresh that only prunes inline would not follow its own routing.

state-selection.md.rationale: A refresh-intent UNCONDITIONAL planner required read: the governing rubric for keeping only facts that change the next action when rewriting the handoff.

workflow-trigger.md.rationale: A pickup/judge-intent planner read; not opened on a refresh run.
workflow-trigger.md.trigger: pickup intent — starting from the named workflow trigger
